remarks: Beautifully updated, fully furnished, end unit townhouse awaits your arrival. This turnkey home offers 2 bedrooms (second bedroom in attic has permit), 1 full bathroom. The main level features an inviting open-concept floor plan accented by hardwood floors and recessed lighting. A sun-filled living room seamlessly flows into a contemporary full-sized kitchen, which boasts quartz counter tops, white shaker cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a stylish breakfast bar perfect for casual dining and entertaining. A primary bedroom features dual custom closets with built-in storage systems, an arched window and vaulted ceiling. An updated full bathroom with gray subway tile and modern vanity completes the main floor. The second bedroom with hardwood floors is privately located on the second floor. This move-in-ready property is available as a 1-year furnished rental. Located near dining, shopping, major commuting routes, and Metro-North stations. Applicants must apply through/ RentSpree for credit, background, and rental history verification. Ask LA for RentSpree link. 1-year rental starting August 1st.
